reviews.review_title: The absolute best kept secret of VR
reviews.review_description: When it comes to standalone, fun x excercise games, this is an absolute gem.
This games might be for someone but not for me. Most of the time I felt just punching in the air. Doesn't really give you the feeling of slicing ninja and the block is awfull.
Fantastic game, and a great work out
Exciting and fun, with a great workout! It will make you sweat. Why aren't the achievements showing up in my Meta feed like all my other games?
I immediately was disappointed and I did that know I could request my money back. Do not make the same mistake I did.

reviews.review_title: Amazing Game, but it has issue
reviews.review_description: I love this game. It is amazing, it’s fun, my brother and I love to take turns playing it and going through waves of enemies in an arcade style. But there are 2 major issues. The first issue lies within the tracking which seems to be problematic at times as it can easily lose your hands, but the much much larger issue is the difficulty. I play on ninja (aka normal) and I have been stuck on level 9 on a boss fight for several hours, and it is just irrationally difficult with too much happening at once. The boss throws you into a bullet hell like state, which doesn’t work well in this game, and then I don’t know if it’s a glitch or not but I have a problem where the boss has a tendency to attack and I block him, but he instantly blocks so I have no chance to damage him. The game does have some bugs and issues, but it’s an incredibly fun game that I would gladly recommend to anyone lookin for a fun arcade style non stop action ninja game, just be ready for challenges and trying many times

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to rate the game! We have made some improvements to the level 9 and 12 boss fights so if you're stuck on either of those help is on the way. We're going to keep working on the game so stay tuned as we plan to slash new bugs and add cool new features!

reviews.review_description:
This is so much fun, I’ve just got out of the shower and need another from all this crazy slicing ninja work out!
New to my VR I’ve tried a number of games that gives me motion sickness, slightly cagey on this one.  However pleasantly pleased its Just arcade entertaining fun! Taking the blood out I think when the kids come round they will like it too.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words. Creating a fast-paced experience that is also accessible for everyone is one of our goals so it's great to hear that you are able to enjoy this! More to come, and we hope the kids enjoy as well!

reviews.review_description: In past fighters I’ve found myself programming my body to do what the game needs. You know what I’m talking about, when you know something is physically impractical in real life but necessary to progress. As unrealistic as the game is, it made me feel like I was actually fighting. The block and parry system are the most fluid of any quest game I’ve tried. That’s where this game shines.
Super fun! Gets hard pretty fast, but overall slicing ninjas is super satisfying

For those of you who loved ninja and samurai games growing up, this game is for you. The controls are responsive, the gameplay is engaging, and it has a decent amount of replayability.

There are several different stages, which become increasingly difficult, even on novice difficulty. This isn't a problem though because the challenge makes you use a combination of offense and defense. additionally, it can be quite the workout.

The only issue I ran into was that I had difficulty deflecting the ninja stars with the gauntlets, so it made it difficult to take out the couple of enemies that seemed to only attack with projectiles. 
This in no way made the game any less fun though. It was well worth the money.

I bought this just after trying the demo, and it delivers. Tons of content, leaderboards, great action and gets you moving. I play this second only to Pistol Whip. Before I bought this, I read the reviews and thought it may be "meh" - but after trying the demo I was sold! Price is right (it's a bargain - tons of levels, difficulties, and modes (including archery modes), weapons....but most importantly they nail the setting! I feel like a Ninja or a martial artist from a Shaw Bros. film! 

It is showing it's age - I really wish they would do a texture update for so of the blood, faces, etc... very blurry up close, also if they upped it to 90hz on the Quest 2 that would be awesome (though I can't tell if it would matter - runs like a hot katana through butter!). This game doesn't need more content, just a bit of a "update" in the graphics.

In saying all that - it's cheap at $20 - and you get a ton of value, multiple modes, challenges, difficulties and waves of enemies to fight. It's a great cardio game and you don't even feel like you're working out (like any good VR workout game). 

So yes, it's a 2019 game - the graphics are more "early Oculus 1", but you get a ton of value and while the devs may not support it anymore now, they did over a year pouring balancing updates, new content and other challenges, so I'd say it's pretty complete (though if they could address the textures that would be amazing).

You won't regret this purchase!

Here's hoping for a Ninja Legends 2!
Just 💯 awesome!!!!
If you've ever wanted to chop off a limb and then turn just in time to parry and slice off his legs it's worth 15 pounds all day long mate
I got this for chistmas and it has been Amazing

HelloI just purchased the game with the Cyber Monday Deal and after the tutorial, I hit the trigger to start the first level and there is just a red bar in front of me like enemies are outside the doorway or something but NOTHING happens...PLEASE RESPOND!!!

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that you're having an issue with the game. We would love to figure out what's happening with your device and help resolve any issue that is preventing you from playing. Please reach out to us at contact@playcoinflip.com or join our discord https://discordapp.com/invite/ninjalegends so we can get you back into the action!

reviews.review_description: Wow wow, this is a whole another level of fun plus workout. Hope the graphics will improve for more realistic experience. Very underrated should have more reviews. I enjoy it more than beat saber, definitely recommend!
very good

reviews.review_title: Fun game to play and lose weight
reviews.review_description:
If you like ninja themes, great action and the ability to burn some calories, this game is for you.  ￼

Broke a lamp my first round swinging my virtual swords around the living room, so be sure to set good boundaries.  Lesson learned, but didn’t stop me from jumping back into the game.

Its a fun arcade style game, my only minor complaints. Mostly the two handed weapons feel a little wonky, and sometimes the bow doesn't hit enemys if they are in a running animation. But those are minor complaints to a fun game.!!

reviews.review_title: Cardio and fun all in one
reviews.review_description: I was looking for games where we can do some exercise but being still a game, and take advante of the V4 and found this one after some good reviews. It was a total spot on! It has an story mode, with very good atmosphere, instructions and balanced difficulty. Then you have an endless mode, and some other I didn't try yet. To say some 'downside' it makes you sweet a lot, so no good to pass through the headset with some friends. Seriously, at this cost, I think this is a must
